class Config
{
    setting1 = "value1";
    setting2 = 123;
    
    class Video
    {
        resolution = "1920x1080";
        fullscreen = true;
        vsync = false;
    };
    
    class Audio
    {
        masterVolume = 0.8;
        musicVolume = 0.6;
        effectsVolume = 1.0;
    };
};

class GameSettings
{
    difficulty = 2;
    saveOnExit = true;
};
